body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: calibre config externalization + books-over-bus
body.intention: I intend that the predicted side-effects of encapsulating calibre config + bus access are observed before any becomes a silent regression.
body.description:
**What changed:** calibre device reads machine config from ~/.unseen_university/devices/calibre/ (repo config.cfg removed, code default de-hardcoded, path fixed to include Calibre Portable); callers move to MCP-bus book access. **Predicted unintended effects:** (1) removing the hardcoded default means a fresh checkout with NO runtime config.cfg gets an empty/placeholder path -> calibredb fails until configured (intended, but must fail LOUD with a clear 'configure ~/.unseen_university/devices/calibre/config.cfg' message, not a silent empty result); (2) other code or tests may still import the repo config.cfg or the old _LIBRARY_PATH_DEFAULT -> break on removal (grep before deleting); (3) the corrected path (Calibre Portable segment) may differ from what a previously-working caller expected if anything relied on the wrong-but-present path; (4) bus migration adds a live dependency on the calibre device being up — a book fetch now fails if calibre.0 is down where a direct path used to work offline. **Signals to watch:** device self_test/status shows the loaded library_path; calibredb_available true; search_books returns for a known title; grep clean of machine paths in repo; no caller ImportError on the removed config.cfg. **Gate condition:** check by 2026-07-15 or once the device runs on a live book query. **Affected files:** None — observation only. **Design rules:** none apply. **Scope boundary:** observe, annotate occurred/clear/partial, close. **Completion criteria:** predicted effects observed and annotated; ticket closed. **Test plan:** no tests — observation ticket.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
